source_pr.title: ttl: fix data race in TTL manager and test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: YangKeao <yangkeao@chunibyo.icu>

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #40944

Problem Summary:

Fix the data race to read and initialize the TTL job manager.

### What is changed and how it works?

Use the atomic pointer to store the TTL job manager.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code
